summary_one_line: Input must reach a well-formed external-subset DTD body that drives the parse loop to consume markup and exit cleanly at EOF.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Bytes that form a structurally valid DTD external-subset body so the parse loop at parser.c:7137 advances through markup declarations and conditional sections rather than tripping the XML_ERR_EXT_SUBSET_NOT_FINISHED error path; the winning side is the false branch (loop continues/exits without halting). This requires the byte stream after the DOCTYPE/SYSTEM header to satisfy the multi-byte token comparisons ('<','!','[' for conditional sections; '<','!'/'?' for markup decls) that gate xmlParseConditionalSections and xmlParseMarkupDecl.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds carry the intact header '<?xml version="1' / '<!DOCTYPE a SYSTEM "dtds/1' and the W-only coverage reaches line 7140 xmlParseConditionalSections, showing the loop body actually parses a conditional section rather than halting. value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient retained the intermediate near-match inputs that incrementally satisfy the byte-comparison gates inside the loop.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds take the true branch and never exit the loop cleanly; one loser seed has its leading bytes corrupted to 'c8 c8 c8 c8 31 32 37 ec ff ff ff', breaking the structured prefix. naive/cmplog lack the CMP_MAP near-match feedback, so they cannot climb the gradient toward a body that drives the loop to the winning side and instead stall on the xmlFatalErr/xmlHaltParser path at 7144-7146.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile (and value_profile_cmplog) add CMP_MAP gradient feedback: each intercepted CMP writes a Hamming/prefix-distance bucket, so an input whose operand pair is closer to matching the gated byte comparisons is preserved as corpus. This lets the VP variants ratchet toward a well-formed DTD body. cmplog's I2S alone is insufficient (cmplog loses to value_profile_cmplog), confirming the decisive technique is the value_profile CMP_MAP gradient, not I2S substitution.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the external-subset parse loop whose globally blocked side is the false branch.
Both decisive pairs are value_profile-delta pairs with value_profile / value_profile_cmplog as winners.
The second decisive pair confirms the same value_profile delta with vpc beating cmplog.
Winner-only coverage reaches xmlParseConditionalSections in the loop body, evidence the loop advances rather than halts.
Loser-only coverage hits the fatal-error / halt path inside the loop's else arm.
Winner-resolving seeds carry the structured DOCTYPE/SYSTEM header.
A loser-blocking seed has its leading bytes corrupted, breaking the structured prefix.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: c8 c8 c8 c8 31 32 37 ec ff ff ff 78 6d 6c 5c 0a

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile preserves inputs whose CMP operands are closer to matching via a distance-bucket map.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile does not use I2S substitution, isolating the gradient as the divergent technique.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: claimed_mechanism is CMP_MAP gradient (value_profile feedback), not I2SRandReplace, so the mandatory lineage dash-row check does not apply. The attribution rests on both decisive pairs sharing the value_profile delta (vp>naive and vpc>cmplog), which isolates the CMP_MAP gradient as the winning technique; cmplog's I2S alone loses, ruling out I2S as decisive.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with the same gated byte comparisons in the parse loop where naive and value_profile resolve the false branch at statistically equal rates, showing the CMP_MAP gradient confers no advantage on reaching the winning side.

weakest_evidence_point: The byte-diff offsets are flagged PARTIAL with many distinct loser values, so the specific byte gate the gradient climbs is inferred from the loop's source-level comparisons rather than a clean concentrated offset.
